feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP User Administration and Authorization
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP User Administration and Authorization Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Last logon of deleted user
entry.content:
Is there a possibility to identify the last logon date & time of a deleted user?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: User access to fields in Sales Order
entry.content:
Hello,

We have created a custom Flavor for the create Sales order app and we want that it is a default one for every user in the system. This is not the case, when an user has created his own custom flavor.

How this can be managed system wide.

Second question is how to derive which should be user, the custom flavor or the original screen. We have tried by adding the flavor as a restriction to the role for the app, but it does not work.

S4Hana Cloud

entry.title: usr02 broken user record in ILD client 000
entry.content:
Hi colleagues,

We found a user record without BNAME in usr02 table in our system client 000. It is quite strange and can you please check and help to repair the broken record?


Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Align role assignment between SAP ERP systems
entry.content:
Hi,Currently my business users have different role assignment in validation system than in production system. This causes errors in production because testing done in validation was successful but in production it does not work for user because user has (normally) less authorizations.
I would like to have in my validation system the same role assignment for users than I have in my productive system.
Is there any tool to do it?If not, would you suggest any process? I tried to compare using Excel but it does not work very well.ThanksManuel

entry.title: OData service is not visible in SU24 for custom apps
entry.content:
We have requirement to build two Custom FIORI apps as part of XT transformation process. we can not able to find the related OData service in SU24.
For instance: Custom apps - Manage Payment Cards on Business Partner & Sales Order – Payment Card.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custome Z Role - Fiori app and T code mapping
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please provide the tables for Fiori apps (all types) and Transaction codes mapping in roles.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to find roles which contain specific objects and field values on table level?
entry.content:
How to find all roles which contain the object I_BEGRP where the field BEGRP has the value XYZ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Table access limitation and "SELECT" command
entry.content:
Dear All

I would like to address a certain issue.

As an example, we aim to restrict access to the PA0001 table, which belongs to HR, throughout the system with proper authorization. To achieve this, we have made adjustments on the following objects.

S_TABU_DIS

S_TABU_CLI

S_TABU_NAM

S_TABU_LIN

Following these adjustments, access to tables that we have restricted via transaction codes such as Se16, Se16N, Sm30, or application-specific transaction codes is no longer possible. Up to this point, we have achieved our desired outcome. However, when a simple program starting with 'Z' was executed through Se38, a select operation in table PA001 retrieved the data.

When we want to double-click on the table name in the program with the user account running the program and see the result, the system gives the message "You do not have authorization". The user account, which cannot access the table through transaction codes such as SE16 or SE16N, can access the table using a simple SELECT code. How is this possible?

Does anyone have comments or experience with the data received when the "select" command is executed in the program?

Note: There are also limitations on the "S_DEVELOP" object.

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: Fiori Catalog Refresh with PRGN_COMPARE_ROLE_MENU
entry.content:
We have many single roles whose Fiori Catalogs needs to be refreshed/updated via program PRGN_COMPARE_ROLE_MENU.


We need to know if there is a way for us to identify the Fiori Apps that are impacted by the mass generation and what authorization objects will be updated or deleted after we run the program.



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Restrict user access to a G/L Account in Sap By Design
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to know if it is possible in Sap Business By Design to restrict access to certain G/L accounts for users, especially regarding the the GL Bank Accounts.

Thanks in advanced!

entry.title: SU53 Errors - Notify to me
entry.content:
Hello Community , 

i want to know if i can have a notify when someone have a authorization error.

SAP 4hana have this option to notify to me , in real time, when some user have Errors in SU53 ?

Thanks.

entry.title: Hi Team, We need to have the ‘Administrator’ or ‘ Snippet Author’ role to be assigned in 'SAP Enable
Periodic report for number of concurrent users in SAP.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We want to get the number of concurrent users periodically in SAP. Is there any SAP report which can provide this detail periodically? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: KE5Z restrict authorization
entry.content: Hi, I have this t-code in roles (with many other t-codes) that are inherited. This t-code can be restricted only via K_PCA field but that is no organization field which means that if mother role is changed/corrected and then profiles of the inherited roles re-generated, all the data in object K_PCA are lost (or set by mother role). I have tried many ways how to add addition checks to this t-code, but nothing actually worked (SU24, SU93, creating additional object via KE37, etc). Any other ideas? Thank you.

entry.title: auth. object to restrict access to global data/ client level
entry.content:
An authorization object needs to be applied to several roles.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: The user can use y tcode YMM_INV but in SUIM it does not reflect in the said User ID SAPOCMM6
entry.content: The user can use y tcode YMM_INV but in SUIM it does not reflect in the said User ID SAPOCMM6

entry.title: BAPI_USER_CHANGE not work under CUA environment
entry.content:
Hello SAP

We are trying to change user password by FM( BAPI_USER_CHANGE ).  Our SAP system is running on CUA environment. Central system is Client( 100 ) of Development Server. We have checked restrictions of this FM under CUA.  No special restriction were found. 

I thought changing initial password will lead changing password of users on child system. Changing anohter item like first name & last name will lead to changing those of user on child system. However nothing happened as we expected. So we didn't specified target child system. I attach our test senario. By the way, excel file cannot uploaded ? 

Why anything happen ? Is ther any restriction for Functional Module under CUA environment ?

Best Regards,

entry.title: change company name & address
entry.content:
Hi Sap
my company has change name and address.

so i want to change that for all users in system


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BAPI_USER_CHANGE under CUA environment
entry.content:
Hello SAP

We are trying to change user password by FM( BAPI_USER_CHANGE ).  Our SAP system is running on CUA environment. We have checked restrictions of this FM under CUA.  No special restriction were found. 

I thought changing initial password will lead changing password of users on child system. Changing anohter item like first name & last name will lead to changing those of user on child system. However nothing happened as we expected. So we didn't specified target child system.

Why anything happen ? Is ther any restriction for Functional Module under CUA environment ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to change log retention period about User Change Documents in sap hana
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

I wonder if there is a way to change the log retention period for permissions and profile items that are output when inquiring user change documents through transaction SUIM.

Whether it can be easily changed through setting,
Please check if we need to develop a program that deletes data from a specific table and if there is any other way, please let us know.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
